LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_Protectgear_BodyArmor.d: Une armure de combat de couche intermédiaire portée par les soldats lourds de la Fédération doberman. Cette armure protège le corps à l’aide de plaques de plasteel, y compris les zones vulnérables, et elle est équipée d’un exosquelette GEN 1 qui confère au porteur une force supérieure aux capacités humaines.
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_Protectgear_Pauldrons.d: Une version renforcée des épaulières doberkin.
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_BallisticHelmet_Tactica: A variant of the doberkin ballistic helmet, modified with gadgets that may help the wearer in combat.
A variant of the doberkin tactical ballistic helmet. now equipped with an armored facemask that provides minimum protection against physical damage and toxic hazards.

A variant of the doberkin tactical ballistic helmet. Now heavily reinforced with plasteel plates which offers optimal amounts of protection, and rigged with advanced tech which greatly aid the wearer in combat.
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_Balaclava_Reinforced.de: A balaclava reinforced with plasteel plates. This variant of the balaclava offers a slight increase to blunt protection towards the vulnerable parts of the head, which are the backhead and forehead.
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_Balaclava_Sniper.label: doberkin tireur d’élite balaclava
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_Balaclava_Sniper.descri: A modified version of the balaclava. Equipped with a cranial stabilizaer which aids a marksman's shooting capabilities, the overall accuracy of ranged weapons have been increased significantly.
LanguageData.Doberkin_GlovesAdvanced.label: gants avancés
LanguageData.Doberkin_GlovesAdvanced.description: Une paire de gants avancés, portés par des combattants vétérans et des guerriers d'élite de la Fédération doberman.
LanguageData.Doberkin_BootsAdvanced.label: bottes avancées
LanguageData.Doberkin_BootsAdvanced.description: Une paire de bottes avancées, portées par des combattants vétérans et des guerriers d'élite de la Fédération doberman.
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_NeckProtector_ADV.label: doberkin neck protector "with pouch"
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_NeckProtector_ADV.descr: An alternate version of the standard neck protector, now offers more protection and an increase in carry capacity.
